name: cursy
description: Control Cursor from iMessage. Text your own number; a local daemon routes each thread to a persistent cursor-agent session and replies via iMessage.

scripts.build: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 ./src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cursy && bash scripts/sign.sh dist/cursy
scripts.build:x64: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 ./src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cursy-x64 && bash scripts/sign.sh dist/cursy-x64
scripts.install:bin: mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/bin" && cp dist/cursy "$HOME/.local/bin/.cursy.new" && mv -f "$HOME/.local/bin/.cursy.new" "$HOME/.local/bin/cursy" && echo 'installed to ~/.local/bin/cursy'
